basic_details.job_title: Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank I.T. Junior Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: The Surendranagar District Co-Op. Bank Ltd.
basic_details.short_information: The Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank Ltd. (SDCB) has released an official recruitment notification for the post of IT-Junior Officer. The bank invites applications from active and experienced candidates for 5 vacancies. Applications must be submitted between 14 July 2026 and 21 July 2026. This article covers every detail from the official notification, including eligibility, age limit, educational qualification, application fee, and how to apply.

important_dates.raw: Notification Release Date: 13 July 2026 Application Start Date: 14 July 2026 Application Last Date: 21 July 2026 | Applications must reach the bank in a sealed cover within this period.

application_fee.details: Candidates must submit a Demand Draft of ₹300/- drawn in favor of "The Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank Ltd." along with the application form.

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 35 years (as on the date of advertisement)

qualification.details: Candidates must hold one of the following degrees from a recognized university: | M.C.A. B.Tech (IT) M.Sc. (IT) B.E. (IT) Or an equivalent degree | Candidates must have scored 55% or more marks (or equivalent CGPA) at the graduate/post-graduate level. | Note: Candidates currently studying in the final year/semester of the required degree are not eligible to apply. | Candidates must have a minimum of 2 years of experience in the IT field. Preference will be given to candidates with 2 years or more of experience in the banking/financial IT industry.

selection_process: The selection process (such as written exam

or document verification stages) is not specified in the official notification. The notification only states that the final decision on approving or rejecting any candidate's eligibility rests with the bank.
how_to_apply: Visit the official bank website: www.sdc.bank.in
Download the application form for the IT-Junior Officer post.
Fill in the application form completely and attach the required enclosures.
Attach a Demand Draft of ₹300/- in favor of "The Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank Ltd."
Place the application form and enclosures in a sealed cover.
Send/deliver the sealed cover to the bank's address (given below) between 14 July 2026 and 21 July 2026.
important_instructions: Candidates studying in the final year/semester of the required degree are not eligible to apply. The bank holds the final right to approve or reject any candidate's eligibility. The application form and demand draft must be sent in a sealed cover within the specified application window. Preference will be given to candidates with banking/financial IT industry experience of 2 years or more.

content_sections.heading: Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank I.T. Junior Officer Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview

rows.details: The Surendranagar District Co-Op. Bank Ltd.
Offline (application form to be downloaded and sent by post/hand in a sealed cover)
Not more than 35 years (as on the date of advertisement)

content_sections.heading: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release Date: 13 July 2026 Application Start Date: 14 July 2026 Application Last Date: 21 July 2026 Applications must reach the bank in a sealed cover within this period.

content_sections.heading: SDCB IT Junior Officer Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The bank has announced a total of 5 vacancies for the post of IT-Junior Officer.

content_sections.heading: Job Role / Nature of Work
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will supervise the bank's helpdesk, system administration, and communication infrastructure teams. Their responsibilities will include ensuring uninterrupted IT operations, strong networking, cyber security, system reliability, and IT compliance.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must hold one of the following degrees from a recognized university: M.C.A. B.Tech (IT) M.Sc. (IT) B.E. (IT) Or an equivalent degree Candidates must have scored 55% or more marks (or equivalent CGPA) at the graduate/post-graduate level. Note: Candidates currently studying in the final year/semester of the required degree are not eligible to apply. Candidates must have a minimum of 2 years of experience in the IT field. Preference will be given to candidates with 2 years or more of experience in the banking/financial IT industry.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Candidates must submit a Demand Draft of ₹300/- drawn in favor of "The Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank Ltd." along with the application form.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process (such as written exam, interview, or document verification stages) is not specified in the official notification. The notification only states that the final decision on approving or rejecting any candidate's eligibility rests with the bank.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: The notification states that the application form must be sent with "enclosures," but it does not list the specific documents required. Candidates are advised to check the detailed application form on the official website for the exact document checklist, as this is not specified in the official notification text.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for SDCB IT Junior Officer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official bank website: www.sdc.bank.in Download the application form for the IT-Junior Officer post. Fill in the application form completely and attach the required enclosures. Attach a Demand Draft of ₹300/- in favor of "The Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank Ltd." Place the application form and enclosures in a sealed cover. Send/deliver the sealed cover to the bank's address (given below) between 14 July 2026 and 21 July 2026.

content_sections.heading: Address for Sending Application
content_sections.text: The Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank Ltd., Head Office, "Sahkar Bhavan", G.I.D.C. Plot No. - H 22&23, Surendranagar - Vadhwan Main Road, Surendranagar - 363035

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Candidates studying in the final year/semester of the required degree are not eligible to apply. The bank holds the final right to approve or reject any candidate's eligibility. The application form and demand draft must be sent in a sealed cover within the specified application window. Preference will be given to candidates with banking/financial IT industry experience of 2 years or more.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the I.T. Junior Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the I.T. Junior Officer post is 21-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the I.T. Junior Officer position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.C.A., B.Tech (IT), M.Sc. (IT), B.E. (IT) or equivalent degree with at least 55% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the I.T. Junior Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the I.T. Junior Officer post announced by the Surendranagar District Co-Operative Bank.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the I.T. Junior Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the I.T. Junior Officer post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 300/- for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.
